name: Track ANC resolution metadata and attachment manifests.
update_strategy: Fetch the ANC resolutions portal JSON manifest and inspect document attachment metadata before deeper attachment downloading or ANC/SMD expansion.

name: Track statutory and administrative legal source systems before deeper parsing.
update_strategy: Track statutory and administrative legal source systems before deeper parsing.

name: Fetch DCGIS registry snapshots, generate candidates, promote broad thin records.
update_strategy: Fetch DCGIS registry snapshots, generate candidates, promote broad thin records.

name: Track operational ArcGIS feed metadata before row-level ingestion.
update_strategy: Fetch metadata and row counts for 311 service requests, crime incidents, building permits, and business licenses before deeper delta or row-level ingestion.

name: Track PASS procurement and payment table metadata before row-level ingestion.
update_strategy: Fetch PASS ArcGIS table metadata and row counts for purchase orders, payments, forecast, contracts, solicitations, and solicitation attachments before deeper row-level ingestion.

name: Manifest OCFO, BOE, Council, Courts, and ANC publication pages before PDF/table parsing.
update_strategy: Manifest OCFO, BOE, Council, Courts, and ANC publication pages before PDF/table parsing.

name: Track source-discovery metadata from the Enterprise Dataset Inventory.
update_strategy: Fetch Enterprise Dataset Inventory metadata and row counts before generating source candidates or deeper source-discovery records.
